user.title: gHAndalf — get started
user.description: Map the two essentials and you're running. Everything else (air quality, presence, nudge timing) is grouped under Configure afterwards.

data_description.pv_production_power: The sensor reporting how much your solar is generating, in watts.
data_description.household_consumption_power: The sensor reporting how much the house is using, in watts.

init.title: gHAndalf settings
init.description: Pick an area to configure. Changes apply on save.

data_description.grid_import_power: Optional. Lets gHAndalf tell real export from battery charging.
data_description.grid_export_power: Optional. Power flowing out to the grid.
data_description.battery_soc: Optional. Used so advice respects a full/empty battery.
data_description.surplus_threshold_w: Only suggest using solar once this much (W) is going to the grid. Default 1000.
data_description.electricity_price_sensor: Optional. Your live import price (e.g. EKZ current price). With the average below, gHAndalf nudges when it's a cheap or pricey moment to run flexible loads.
data_description.electricity_price_average_sensor: Optional. The day's average/reference price to compare against (e.g. EKZ average price today). A flat tariff stays silent; a stepped or 15-min dynamic tariff lights up automatically.
data_description.price_margin_pct: How far below/above the average counts as cheap/pricey. Default 15%.

air_quality.title: Air quality & comfort
air_quality.description: Map a humidity sensor for each room that has a dehumidifier. Add the dehumidifier's plug-power sensor too (same HA area) and gHAndalf can tell when it's already running.

data.require_occupancy: Only nudge when the room is occupied

data_description.dehumidifier_sensors: One per room that has a dehumidifier. The room name comes from each sensor's HA area.
data_description.dehumidifier_power_sensors: Optional. Paired to a room by shared HA area; lets gHAndalf skip the nudge when it's already on.
data_description.humidity_threshold_pct: At/above this %, suggest running the dehumidifier. Default 60.
data_description.humidity_off_threshold_pct: At/below this %, suggest turning it off (if its plug shows it running). Default 45. The gap to the run-it value avoids on/off flapping.
data_description.dehumidifier_running_watts: Plug draw above which the dehumidifier counts as running. Default 10.
data_description.co2_sensors: One per room you want monitored. Room name comes from each sensor's HA area.
data_description.window_sensors: Optional. Paired to a room by shared HA area; gHAndalf skips the nudge when that room's window is already open.
data_description.occupancy_sensors: Optional. Paired to a CO2 room by shared HA area. Only used when "Only nudge when the room is occupied" is on; a room with no sensor then counts as occupied.
data_description.require_occupancy: Off by default: high CO2 is worth clearing even if you're in the next room or about to walk in. Turn on to nudge only for rooms someone's currently in (needs occupancy sensors mapped).
data_description.outdoor_temp_sensors: Optional, in priority order — the first with a reading wins (e.g. your garden sensor first, a weather entity as fallback). Shown in the message and used for the temperature gate.
data_description.outdoor_humidity_sensors: Optional, same priority idea. With indoor humidity, lets gHAndalf skip the nudge when opening a window would only make the room more humid.
data_description.indoor_temp_sensors: Optional. Paired to a CO2 room by shared HA area; used with indoor humidity to compare indoor vs outdoor air before advising.
data_description.indoor_humidity_sensors: Optional. Paired to a CO2 room by shared HA area. Without a full indoor + outdoor humidity pair the moisture check is skipped (advice still fires).
data_description.co2_threshold_ppm: At/above this ppm, suggest opening a window. Default 1000 (1000-1400 = act, 1400+ = stuffy).
data_description.ventilate_min_outdoor_temp_c: Below this outdoor temp, skip the nudge (not worth the heat loss). Default 3. Lower it for aggressive winter CO2 control.
data_description.ventilate_max_outdoor_temp_c: Above this outdoor temp, skip the nudge (outdoor air won't freshen or cool). Default 28.
data_description.occupancy_grace_minutes: How long after the last motion a room still counts as occupied, so a sitting-still person isn't treated as gone. Default 15.

data_description.persons: Optional. If set, gHAndalf only nudges when at least one of these people is home. Leave empty to always nudge.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Optionally push nudges to your phone. Without a target, advice stays on the sensor only.

data.notify_persistent: Also show in Home Assistant's notifications

data_description.notify_targets: Notify entities to push each nudge to (e.g. your phone's companion-app notifier). The same anti-nagging timing applies — only what passes the nudge gate is sent.
data_description.notify_persistent: Also post each nudge to Home Assistant's own notification panel (the bell in the sidebar), not just your phone. Keyed per advice, so a repeat updates in place. Default off.

advanced.title: Nudges & timing
advanced.description: How often gHAndalf looks, and how it avoids nagging.

data_description.scan_interval: How often (seconds) to re-read your sensors. Default 30.
data_description.quiet_hours_start: No proactive nudges from this time…
data_description.debounce_seconds: A condition must persist this long before nudging, to ignore brief spikes. Default 300.
data_description.cooldown_minutes: Minimum gap before repeating the same advice. Default 60.
data_description.max_nudges_per_day: Cap on total nudges per day across everything. Default 8.
